body_txt: His friend's pissed, lost and scared and just asked him for a lift but his girlfriend's telling him to blow him off. What does he do? Ditch her, of course. This trope refers to the concept of putting friends before a romantic interest, with the idea that love is fleeting , but True Companions are forever. Although, this is ignoring the fact that friendships can also be fleeting and can have the same problems that romances could be plagued with. A sub-trope of The Bro Code . It is a popular saying among frat boys and their sympathizers. "Pals before gals" is the G rated version. "Mates before dates" is an Australian version. "Chicks before dicks" is picking up steam as the feminine version ; "sisters before misters" or "Bows before bros" works too. Compare with True Companions , Friend Versus Lover , and Two-Timing with the Bestie .
